mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS o JOIN MEMBER m ON o.member_id = m.id WHERE o.status IN ('PLACED', 'PAID', 'READY', 'SHIPPING')
AND m.church_id = #{churchId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GOODS_ITEM WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND stock <= noti_qty

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUBSCRIPTION s JOIN MEMBER m ON s.member_id = m.id WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND m.church_id = #{churchId}
